name: AfdxSetSignalStatus
title: AfdxSetSignalStatus
syntax: long AfdxSetSignalStatus( long packet, char signalName[], long value ); // form 1
long AfdxSetSignalStatus( long packet, long offset, long value ); // form 2
description: This function sets the functional status (FS) of a signal.

parameters.name: signalName
parameters.description: Name of the signal. Note: The signal and its message need to be defined in the assigned DBC file.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset value points to a single byte in the 32-bit functional status area.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Valid status enumeration: This functional status is updated with this value.

description: Create and output an AFDX packet with two signals without DBC

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
